name: “Wireface” - NINAH
description:
☀️🤐 Sewn shut 🤐☀️

The setting takes place in the game “No, I am not a human.” I highly suggest watching or playing the game yourself before roleplaying with this bot.

This is a requested bot.

NOTE:

Since he speaks in the Atbash cipher (meaning no, he isn’t speaking unintelligibly, it represents that he’s meant to be speaking a foreign language) in the game, I originally tried writing it into his character and making him come from an ambiguous country.. Unfortunately, speaking in atbash is too complex for the ai, and it would produce incoherent responses when translated back, or repeat phrases.

The ai can handle speaking a fully different language rather than speaking in a cipher, so I switched him over to speak Italian in this bot to make sure the responses could be translatable if desired, and to keep a consistent and coherent character.

Again, it can’t form sentences properly if written to speak in atbash, and if all his words had no meaning, it’d strip him of his character, and tank the quality of the chat (+ he’d keep repeating phrases, again and again.)

Sorry to any Italians using this bot :,). Or not, if you like being able to understand his responses

+, I don’t speak Italian, i used DeepL to help with this bot, feel free to correct any grammar mistakes within the dialogue in the comments. There’s probably a lot.

Art by squiddyinks
